comment: Copy to config.json and edit. Bedrock auth uses KeySmith — set KEYSMITH_* in .env (see .env.example). bedrockModelName is the KeySmith friendly model name, resolved to an inference-profile ARN at runtime. dryRun=true performs NO GitHub writes or pushes. Flip to false only when ready for live action. autoPushClasses lists author classes ("ci"/"bot"/"human") allowed to push without owner approval when the gate passes; default [] means every change parks at awaiting_approval for you to Approve (risk:high always parks regardless).
